catalog_row.ModelType: Estimated medium-scale New Keynesian DSGE, linearized implementation
catalog_row.KeyFeatures: Firm-specific capital; Calvo prices; Calvo wages; habit formation; variable capital utilization; investment adjustment costs; money demand; working-capital wage finance; neutral and embodied technology shocks; technology-shock timing variant

status_row.notes: First-pass bilingual derivation. Paper-side source matches the model row, but no local technical appendix normalization exists. Several linear implementation equations need targeted source-level formula checks. Dynare was not run.

validation.check: English derivation has all eight required sections and contains (F1)
English and Chinese F-number counts match
validation.details: English count 111, Chinese count 111; 29 unique equation labels in each.

unresolved_issues: No local appendix normalization for US_ACELt exists.
Implementation-level linear equations marked needs_review require targeted source/PDF checks.
Full steady-state ordering was not reconstructed from paper-side appendix material.
Dynare runtime validation was not performed by instruction.
Shared catalog.csv and status.csv were not edited by instruction.
